paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 252 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 196 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 57 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Karim-Merchant — cleared all overdue.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 46 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **44 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,784 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 42 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **28 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 42 days past due with 40 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 14 days past due with 36 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **41 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,163 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 54 days past due with 35 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,424 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 19 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $23,505 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 28 days past due with 18 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **28 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 8. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 52 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Karim-Merchant:** **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 64 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 54 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 41 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

253 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **230 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 37 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$91,383 in payments going out this week** across 54 tasks — make sure funds are available. $10,000 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 64. This needs to turn around today.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 42 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **28 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 39 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 19 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
